primary_sub_stage.name: Analyzing Cause
primary_sub_stage.definition: Active examination of problems, focusing on identifying root causes.

secondary_sub_stages.name: Partial Acceptance of Responsibility
secondary_sub_stages.definition: Growing awareness that personal or internal actions may be contributing to challenges.

employee_questionnaire.question_text: You have spent time analyzing the root causes of the challenges you are facing.
You are exploring data, feedback, or inputs to better understand the issues.
You believe that you or your team may play a role in the challenges you face.
You are willing to adjust your behavior or approach to overcome challenges.

strengths.description: Strong willingness to examine causes and question existing approaches.

weaknesses.description: Responsibility is acknowledged gradually rather than fully embraced.

opportunities.description: Partial acceptance opens the door to meaningful personal change.

threats.description: Without full ownership, analysis may repeat without resolution.

recommended_actions.recommendation: Explicitly identify one personal behavior to change based on analysis.
